plan_metadata.name: group  validation DA repair need login

steps.description: Click inside the "Message Copilot" text input box in the M365 Copilot web app to focus the chat entry field.

parameters.text: show repair records assigned to karin blair

steps.description: Type "show repair records assigned to karin blair" into the main chat input box at the bottom of the agent interface in the M365 Copilot web application.
Press Enter in the message input box of the "M365 Copilot" web chat to submit the query "show repair records assigned to karin blair".
@assertion a button exists to allow action.
Click the first button to allow the permission prompt within the M365 Copilot web chat interface.
